title: zerna riparia
intro: Zerna riparia, also known as the wild rye, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Zerna riparia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
